LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_c.label: Akinoia
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_c.description:
An Outerm state of greatly heightened danger perception.

The principle is unknown, but Outerms possess extremely sharp instincts.
Combined with their nimble bodies, it lets them keep fighting even through storms of bullets.


While active, ranged attacks are dodged at a high rate, while other attacks are dodged at a lower rate.


This state ends after several hours.
